structural_setups.summary: Yield stability and acceptance above monitored treasury value keep the ZN long-side read queryable.
structural_setups.description: Schema-anchored ZN fixture narrative using yield context, auction proximity, and explicit observable query conditions.

query_triggers.description: Trigger when ZN is holding at or above the monitored treasury level with positive delta and macro context populated.

warnings: If macro release context is not populated or yields back up, keep the query blocked.
Auction proximity remains a caution condition even when the trigger is armed.
